Name: Salesforce
Why to avoid (when): If your team is <50 reps. Implementation cost > license cost.

Name: Datadog
Why to avoid (when): If you're under 20 hosts. Cheaper alternatives suffice.

Name: Quip
Why to avoid (when): Only makes sense if deeply in Salesforce.

Name: Synthesia
Why to avoid (when): Avatars look uncanny in close-up. HeyGen's better.

Name: LastPass
Why to avoid (when): Multiple breaches. Switch to 1Password or Bitwarden.

Name: Mulesoft
Why to avoid (when): $80K+ pricing locks out anyone not enterprise.

Name: Workday
Why to avoid (when): Implementation cost > license. Use Rippling/BambooHR until 1000+ employees.

Name: Drift
Why to avoid (when): Sales-focused chat; SMBs locked out by pricing.

Name: Outreach
Why to avoid (when): Pricing locks out teams under 20 reps.

Name: ZoomInfo
Why to avoid (when): Heavy enterprise pricing for what Apollo+Clearbit can do.
